title: Vainglorious
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Vainglorious''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that was present at the [[Battle of ThonBoka]]. Its [[Captain/Legends|captain]] questioned [[Rokur Gepta]]'s tactics before the main battle. The [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerer of Tund]] subsequently ordered that both the captain and his [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] should be thrown out of an [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]] for being individualists.

==Description==
This was one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cruisers that participated in the blockade of the [[ThonBoka]], during the early years of the New Order. Rokur Gepta stripped the ship's captain and his second-in-command of their rank after the captain of the ''[[Intractable]]'' refused to be a front-line attacker. Gepta then ordered them all forced out of the airlocks on their [[Starship/Legends|vessels]], as examples of what would happen to any other officers who dared to disobey his orders.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
